$comment: Curated ambient sound sources for `npm run fetch:ambient`. See docs/RESEARCH-AMBIENT-SOUNDS.md.
HUMAN LICENSE GATE: every entry ships with "cleared": false. fetch-ambient.js SKIPS uncleared
entries. Before flipping an entry to true you MUST: (1) open sourceUrl, confirm the license is CC0
or public-domain (or an accepted CC-BY, with attribution filled in), (2) download the file once and
put its real sha256 in `sha256` (fetch-ambient verifies it), (3) confirm the raw `url` is a direct,
redistribution-clean host (a CC0 GitHub repo pinned to a commit SHA, FreePD mirror, OpenGameArt CC0,
archive.org/Wikimedia CC0 direct file) — NEVER the Freesound API (its ToS forbids re-hosting).
NC / ND / BY-SA are refused by the ingest filter. The URLs/hashes below are PLACEHOLDERS to be
filled during curation; they intentionally do nothing until cleared.

items.label: Ocean waves
items.sourceUrl: https://freesound.org/ (felix.blume CC0 ocean — verify per-ID `license`; download once, vendor)

items.label: Fireplace
items.sourceUrl: https://opengameart.org/ ("Fireplace Sound loop", CC0) OR Freesound samarobryn 414767 (CC0)

items.label: Gentle stream
items.sourceUrl: https://github.com/rafaelmardojai/blanket ("Stream", CC0 — pin a commit SHA)

items.label: Wind
items.sourceUrl: https://github.com/Muges/ambientsounds (wind = felix.blume 139337, CC0 — pin a commit SHA)
